title: Implement continuous loop check for workers 9-15 merge detection and cherry-pick
description: After completing merges for 13-15, create automated loop: for each worker9-15 run git log --oneline origin/wip/checkpoint-20260715..HEAD to detect new commits, associate with beads, cherry-pick to main if new commits found, update beads. Make it run continuously (script + bd scheduling). Verify all quality gates (tests/lint/builds). Do not stop merging process. Follow review loop. Use conservative git. File as epic with child tasks.
